title: Healthcare Charting and Clinical Handoffs
friction_templates: Medication reconciliation delays at shift change
Incomplete charting causing information gaps during handoff
HIPAA compliance concerns slowing information transfer
Charge Nurse not notified of critical patient status changes
Lab results not communicated to covering physician timely
decision_rights_templates: RN owns medication reconciliation completion before shift end
Charge Nurse approves patient assignment changes
Attending physician must acknowledge critical lab values within 1 hour
Unit secretary owns appointment scheduling within EHR
Case manager owns discharge planning communication
stop_doing_templates: Stop verbal-only handoffs - use structured SBAR format
Stop delaying charting until end of shift - chart in real-time
Stop assuming the next shift will 'figure it out'
Stop using workarounds for EHR limitations - escalate to IT
Stop skipping medication reconciliation due to time pressure
experiment_templates: Day 1-2: Implement mandatory SBAR handoff checklist for one unit
Day 3-5: Track charting completion rate at 2-hour intervals
Day 6-7: Review missed handoff items and adjust checklist
